name: 德乌多内·比勒陀利乌斯
name_full: 德乌多内·比勒陀利乌斯 Deoudoné Pretorius

last_movies.title: 海贼王(真人版) 第二季

introduction: Deoudoné Pretorius is a passionate South African actress steadily building her career across both local and international markets. She studied Drama and completed three years of Musical Theatre & Dance training, which gave her exposure to multiple dance styles and physical performance techniques.Her professional journey began in 2020 when she was cast as Stella for kykNET's 21st birthday campaign - a role that became the face of several kykNET commercial campaigns over the following two years, including "Stella Kom Kuier", "Stella Stemme", "'n Ster vir Kersfees", as well as voice-over work.Deoudoné has since built a growing portfolio in Afrikaans television, appearing in kykNET productions such as "Getroud Met Rugby", "Binnelanders", "Diepe Waters", and launching the kykNET game-show "Koppestamp." Her film work includes the Showmax productions "Horisonne" and "Troukoors", the lead in a Forum Films movie "Die Val", as well as the series "De Kleine Griet".She has also branched into English-language and international projects, including work for Disney South Africa, two Tubi films ("Invasive 2: Getaway & "Take-Out"), and the Norwegian feature film "Den Fremmede" directed b"y Eiric Svensson. She also has upcoming releases on Netflix, including a film directed by Mairzee Almas (Shadow and Bone, The Sandman, Outlander) and a series.Driven by curiosity and passion, Deoudoné is committed to continuously growing her craft. She regularly up-skills through stunt training, dance, and outdoor performance work, preparing her for physically demanding and dynamic roles while exploring diverse characters and storytelling styles.
